native.query:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(executed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time,
  device_name,
  component,
  avg(metric_values[indexOf(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')]) AS cpu_pct
FROM performance
WHERE component_type = 'cpu'
  AND has(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')
  AND executed_at >= now() - INTERVAL {{time_range}}
  AND device_name = {{device_name}}
GROUP BY time, device_name, component
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(executed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time,
  device_name,
  avg(metric_values[indexOf(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')]) AS mem_pct
FROM performance
WHERE component_type = 'memory'
  AND has(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')
  AND executed_at >= now() - INTERVAL {{time_range}}
  AND device_name = {{device_name}}
GROUP BY time, device_name
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  device_name,
  component,
  metric_values[indexOf(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')] AS disk_pct
FROM performance_latest FINAL
WHERE component_type = 'disk'
  AND has(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')
ORDER BY disk_pct DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  device_name,
  component_type,
  component,
  metric_names,
  metric_values,
  executed_at
FROM performance_latest FINAL
WHERE device_name = {{device_name}}
ORDER BY component_type, component

dashboard.name: Device Performance
dashboard.description: CPU, memory, disk metrics over time. Use the device filter to focus on a specific device.
